caption: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black blazer, is seated in a black office chair against a plain white background. She is shown speaking in a medium shot, with her hands resting on a dark surface in front of her. The video transitions through a dark blue background featuring white and light blue text. Initially, a quote appears stating, "For any person interested in getting into policy, the Mercatus MA Fellowship is a no-brainer. Between the education, training in the fellowship, and faculty this is the number one place that you could come to." This is followed by the phrase, "Not to mention as well that it's a lot of fun!" attributed to "— Kristine." The final segments display instructions to read more about her story via the "Academic & Student Programs Alumni Spotlight" at "https://bit.ly/2SCTMIb" and to visit "asp.mercatus.org" to learn about the "Mercatus MA Fellowship," noting that "Applications are due Feb 15, 2021."
